checkpointing.strategy: After each authoritative completed week, export the live session state to disk via `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:export`, which now prefers `window.__JONES_FASTLANE_SESSION__` and falls back to `localStorage.jones_fastlane_save` only when no live bridge is present. If browser continuity fails, restore the latest checkpoint into the named session before replaying from onboarding.

slice_policy.default_goal: Advance exactly one completed in-game week for the active persona unless a major blocker or especially high-signal audit event happens first.
slice_policy.detail_log_policy: Write one canonical per-slice detail file per completed week and keep the progress report concise.

next_slice: Resume Persona A from the authoritative Week 10 checkpoint. Player starts Week 11 at ₡428 / Hunger 50% / Sanity 50 with TRAUMA_REBOOT active (242h remaining). Objective: Maintain stability. Work Sanitation-T3 shifts (expect 2 shifts ceiling due to trauma), buy Real-Meat Burger locally at Hab-Pod to minimize travel tax and prevent hunger from compounding back to critical levels.

last_run.summary: Authoritative Week 10 completed. Discovered that travel tax (2CH) is lethal when at 80% hunger with TRAUMA_REBOOT active. Recovered from an initial Energy Drain game-over by restoring the Week 9 checkpoint and purchasing food locally at Hab-Pod 404. Completed 2x Sanitation-T3 shifts and ended the turn at ₡428 / Hunger 50% / Sanity 50. The trauma-reboot ceiling still limits throughput but the run is stabilized.
